name: Tiger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips and remove from heat.
2. Measure the crushed sugared cornflakes to 1 1/2 cups.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add the eggs and vanilla, beating well.
6. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients, mixing thoroughly.
7. Gently fold in the remaining sugared cornflakes.
8. Slightly swirl melted chocolate through the batter to create streaks.
9. Drop dough onto baking sheets or parchment paper.
10. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes.
11. Makes about 5 dozen cookies, each measuring approximately 2 1/2 inches in diameter.
